calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jack Quan is present.
Attorney Peggy Chang appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Zakariah Saidin is present.
Attorney Aaron A. Farmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of AUG-13-2012 is vacated.
